name: Thin Pancakes
instructions: In a large bowl mix the eggs, salt and sugar.
Add flour and milk, mix together until the batter is smooth.
Heat up a frying pan on a medium-high heat.
Place butter (or oil) on the pan, pour on batter and spread it to cover the whole pan.
Cook until the bottom turns light brown, flip over and repeat on the other side.

name: Manna putra
instructions: Boil a small amount of water in a pot
Turn heat down to medium high and add milk
In a separate bowl, add manna, sugar and salt and mix it together
Once first bubbles start coming up in the milk, turn heat on low and slowly add the mixture while stirring
Stir until uniform texture and desired thickness
